title: Malaysian Gruyere Grill Bites
description: Indulge in these bite-sized, cheesy grill treats, inspired by the bold flavors of Malaysia.
instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. In a bowl, mix together Gruyere Cheese, Malaysian Chili Sauce, and Grill Seasoning.
3. Place a slice of bread on a flat surface and spread a small amount of cheese mixture on it.
4. Place another slice of bread on top to create a sandwich.
5. Brush the grill with Vegetable Oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the sandwiches for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
